calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Dec-18-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610.

**NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) and counsel will be reported to the State Bar if there is no appearance at the next hearing date and compliance.**

Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Continued To Oct-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance; plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400 for failure to appear; The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Oct-30-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Proceedings not reported.
